title: ribes rubrum subsp. pallidum
intro: Ribes rubrum subsp. pallidum is a subspecies of the redcurrant plant, characterized by its pale or yellowish berries and deciduous shrubs with pale green to yellowish leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ribes rubrum subsp. pallidum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system, while also providing antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Ribes rubrum subsp. pallidum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and benefits.
